violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops laying in bulk sugar and flour with handles in product.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -2 containers of egg scramblers were found with temps of 72F. *Appear to have been removed from front hot hold warmer and placed into refrigerator for cooling/re-use. starting cooling temperature was unknown. *Directed staff to dispose of product. -Several containers of cooling gravy dated 1/23 were found at 11:40a.m. tightly covered and stacked in refrigerator with temps of ~65-68F. -Container of gravy dated 1/20 found with temp of 78F, believed to have been removed from front warmer at ~10 a.m. (Morning staff had left at 10:30 a.m.) *Had all gravy product moved to freezer while on-site to expedite cooling.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Could not locate Quat test strips (facility has chlorine test strips available but is using Quat sanitizer).

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans and ceiling.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Quat sanitizer concentrate (without label information) is stored in a re-used mayonnaise container.
Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. -Sani sink solution found at greater than 400ppm Quat.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
